title: Sarko (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sarko''' may refer to one of the following:

==Individuals==
*'''[[Sarko]]''', a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]]
*'''[[Arrek Von Sarko]]''', an individual present on the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]

==Locations==
*The '''[[Sarko system/Legends|Sarko system]]''', an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
**'''[[Sarko VI]]''', an astronomical object located in the Sarko system and also known simply as '''Sarko'''

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Sarko
}}
